commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
From thee. This is our fixed determination for the future. (Haydock)
Will call. Hebrew, "Shall be called by thy name "(St. Jerome; Haydock) thy people. (Symmachus) (Calmet)
But the Vulgate is equally correct, invocabimus. (Montanus) (Protestants) (Haydock)
